email.subject: Re: HARBOUR-7 — small change in line 2 + extra item
email.body:
Hola,

Update to the BOM I sent this morning:

- LINE 2: change galvanized B from 3mm to 5mm. Qty stays 45 TON.
- NEW LINE 4: stainless 316L sheet 1.5mm, 8 TON.

Note: Order line 4 batch with a +2mm tolerance due to port humidity — we will trim on arrival.

Thanks,
María

steps.summary: Loaded email, classified as REVISION. Extracted 2 lines (LINE 2 update + LINE 4 new) but missed the margin note on LINE 4.

line_items.raw_description: change galvanized B from 3mm to 5mm. Qty stays 45 TON.

steps.summary: Detected: LINE 4 is missing the margin note. Email body says 'Order line 4 batch with a +2mm tolerance due to port humidity'. Requesting extractor revision.

args.feedback: LINE 4 missing the margin note. Email body says: 'Order line 4 batch with a +2mm tolerance due to port humidity — we will trim on arrival.' Copy this verbatim into LINE 4's notes field.

steps.summary: Re-extracted with validator feedback applied. LINE 4 now carries the margin note verbatim.

line_items.raw_description: change galvanized B from 3mm to 5mm. Qty stays 45 TON.

line_items.notes: Order line 4 batch with a +2mm tolerance due to port humidity — we will trim on arrival.

steps.summary: All checks pass on iteration 2. Calling exit_validation_loop.
LINE 2 matched (0.94). LINE 4 matched (0.95) but flagged for HITL due to special-handling note (+2mm tolerance).

reconciled_lines.raw_description: change galvanized B from 3mm to 5mm. Qty stays 45 TON.

steps.summary: PO drafting halted: 1 line requires human verification. Wrote REVIEW-HARBOUR-7-v2-*.json and skipped the PO creator entirely (zero LLM tokens spent on po_creator).

result.summary: 1 of 2 lines auto-approved. LINE 4 needs human review before PO can be drafted (margin note adds non-standard tolerance). Reconciliation is otherwise clean and ready.

review.reason: 1 line(s) require human verification before a Purchase Order can be drafted.

reconciled_lines.raw_description: change galvanized B from 3mm to 5mm. Qty stays 45 TON.

review.next_action: Review each flagged line in your procurement console. After approval, re-trigger the pipeline with `approve_hitl: true` (or call create_purchase_order directly with the corrected line_items).
